title: Log Aggregation Architecture
content: Logs flow: container stdout → Fluent Bit DaemonSet → CloudWatch Logs → CloudWatch Insights for ad-hoc queries. Retention: 30 days in CloudWatch, 90 days exported to S3 (Parquet format). Structured JSON logs with standard fields (service, correlationId, level). Log-based metrics: extract error counts and latency percentiles for Grafana dashboards. Cost control: drop debug logs in production via Fluent Bit filter.
